description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, oval-shaped carapace with a mottled brown and tan coloration. The crab has ten appendages, including two prominent front claws (chelae) and eight walking legs, all of which are slender and slightly curved. The surface of the carapace appears hard and slightly textured, with subtle ridges and natural markings. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and short antennae are visible near the eyes. The underside of the crab is lighter in color, and the legs and claws display a gradient from brown to a pinkish hue at the tips.
description: A detailed, brown and tan crab with a hard, textured shell, two large claws, and eight slender legs.
description_view_0: The crab is seen from above, showing the full oval carapace, all legs, and both claws spread outward.
description_view_1: A side profile highlights the crab's body thickness, the curvature of the legs, and the claws extending forward.
description_view_2: The crab is viewed from the rear, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and the back of the carapace.
description_view_3: A frontal view reveals the claws, eyes on stalks, and the forward-facing orientation of the appendages.
